info.name: Khararif API
info.description: App: auth, user (profile, avatar, balance, games), game (question-types/categories/subcategories with counts, rooms, sessions), content, payment (packages, initiate, coupons/apply). Dashboard: login, types/categories/subcategories/questions/avatars/packages/coupons CRUD. Response shapes: types include categories_count; categories include type_name, questions_count; subcategories include category_name, questions_count; questions include type_name.

request.description: Manually pause a playing session. Sets status=paused and syncs paused state to Firebase.
Resume a paused session on the current round. Sets status=playing and restarts the question timer.
TV calls this after 30 seconds when the question timer ends. For life-points stages, missing answers are counted as wrong, then session is paused.
Call when session is paused (after answer submit). TV calls when correct/wrong video ends. Returns finished=true if no more questions.
Force-end the session and mark it as finished. Updates points and pushes final state to Firebase.

If TV is not linked: links TV to room and marks current user as viewing. If TV already linked to this room: marks current user as viewing only. Always sets tvViewJoined for the player in Firebase session teams. Response: linked, viewingTv, roomId, sessionId.
Works with Adventurer (app) or User auth. Requires available package. couponCode optional.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: All dashboard requests require Authorization: Bearer {{token}} (use Dashboard Login first). Types/Categories/Subcategories require permission questions_and_stages; Questions require questions; Avatars/Packages/Coupons require avatars/packages/coupons.
